title: KNOT'sCastle
body:
* This mod pack was made to just sit back and chill. It wasn't made to be too challenging. 

* Most of the content in the pack is quality of life. Such as hammers and chisels.

* When making this pack I intended for it to be played with friends.

*There are things like "Improved Vanilla" to make the game a little more time friendly.
